system.notes: An area-effect spell. This spell creates a pool of darkness equal to one-half the caster's Magic Rating times the spell's successes in meters. The target number depends on the local conditions: bright midday, 6; day, 5; day, overcast, 4; twilight, 3; street light or darker, 2. Every 2 successes imposes a + 1 target modiﬁer for Combat or Perception Tests against targets within the area of shadow.
